export KUBECONFIG=/mydata/karma/runs/short-rerun/ray-e2e-recovery-mid-20260618_085151/bundle/kubeconfig; G(){ grep -iv "Unhandled\|^E0"; }
echo "=== live worker command (3rd elem) ==="; kubectl -n ray get deploy ray-worker -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].command[2]}' 2>/dev/null
echo; echo "=== head pods ==="; kubectl -n ray get pods -l app.kubernetes.io/component=head 2>/dev/null|G
echo "=== ray status ==="; HEAD=$(kubectl -n ray get pod -l app.kubernetes.io/component=head --field-selector=status.phase=Running -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}' 2>/dev/null); echo "head=$HEAD"; kubectl -n ray exec $HEAD -- ray status 2>&1 | G | head -30

input.command:
export KUBECONFIG=/mydata/karma/runs/short-rerun/ray-e2e-recovery-mid-20260618_085151/bundle/kubeconfig; G(){ grep -iv "Unhandled\|^E0"; }
HEAD=$(kubectl -n ray get pod -l app.kubernetes.io/component=head --field-selector=status.phase=Running -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}' 2>/dev/null)
for i in $(seq 1 12); do
  N=$(kubectl -n ray exec $HEAD -- ray status 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^ 1 node_")
  echo "attempt $i: live nodes=$N"
  [ "$N" = "3" ] && break
  sleep 5
done
echo "=== final ==="; kubectl -n ray get deploy ray-worker 2>/dev/null|G
kubectl -n ray exec $HEAD -- ray status 2>&1|G|head -15
input.description: Poll for 3 live nodes and verify worker replicas
